name: @thrunt-god/tui
description: Operator console for THRUNT GOD threat hunting platform

scripts.build:tui-runtime:
mkdir -p ./dist && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bun
// thrunt-god local runtime launcher
import { main } from "../src/cli/index.ts"
await main()
' > ./dist/cli.js && chmod +x ./dist/cli.js
